RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, FREDERICK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3900 3RD STREET APT. 210, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124, LEASE FORFEITED, **INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT**SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
